channel.title: Beben Design Blog
channel.description: Essays and build logs from Beben Design: design decisions, engineering trade-offs, and tools we shipped, written from inside real projects.

item.title: Beben Arcade - twelve games that work with the wifi off
item.description: An installable arcade of twelve tiny games, shipped as 222KB of static files with no engine, no build step, and no network after the first visit. What offline-first costs and what it buys.

item.title: Building Sprite - a chat widget with two brains
item.description: How we built a zero-dependency site guide that answers from an LLM when it can and from a pattern engine when it can't, on a static site with no backend and no keys in the repo.

item.title: Rev Log - why the data format is the product
item.description: Our open source motorcycle telemetry project ships a ride-data format before it ships hardware. The reasoning behind that order, and what it changes about everything else.

item.title: A tool you can download and own
item.description: Our QR code generator is one HTML file that works offline forever. The engineering and the ethics of building tools people can take with them.
